The '''''Red Eclipse''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and [[Red Eclipse (Organization)|enslaver organization]] that was operated by a crew of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] and [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Slavery/Legends|enslavers]] affiliated with the [[Exchange]] that was based out of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. When [[Meetra Surik]] traveled to that world, landing within the [[Refugee Sector]], the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' was put down on a pad that was supposedly reserved for the ''Red Eclipse'', despite protests from the pad master, [[Quello]]. Upon discovering this the ship's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Cahhmakt]], and his crew attempted to hijack the ''Hawk'', but were killed by Surik and her companions.<ref name="KOTOR II" />

==Behind the scenes==
Surik has the choice of commanding the ship's captain to serve him/her. The captain will then depart the ''Ebon Hawk'' with the remnants of his crew and a pledge of service. From this point on a ''Red Eclipse'' slaver can be found in the Nar Shaddaa cantina. Here, a collection of some of the credits that the crew has made could be collected every so often.<ref name="KOTOR II" />

This can be done with both light and dark side characters.<ref name="KOTOR II" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
